purpose: Test the strongest unrefreshed registry-conformant H1 density candidates without opening the sealed portfolio holdout.

selection_source.selection_rule: Prefer old PASS rows with PF >= 1.20, at least 25 trades per 60 days, H1 execution, and a symbol that adds density or diversification to the incumbent. Exclude sleeves already refreshed in the current FTMO workstream.

candidates.reason: Highest old safe-target coverage among unrefreshed H1 candidates and diversifies the NDX-heavy index core.
Highest old trade density among unrefreshed profitable H1 candidates.
Best unrefreshed profitable H1 gold candidate, providing a different mechanism from the index pair.

portfolio_contract.development_survivor_rule: A fixed candidate representation and weight must improve both threshold and adverse development pass rates versus the locked incumbent.
portfolio_contract.holdout_open_rule: Open once only for a development survivor; no post-holdout candidate, filter, or weight substitution.

label: RESEARCH_ONLY_NO_GO
